sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54554" key="katamoni/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμονίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., only found in poet. form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καμμονίη</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
